pi_items.source: Verified against the prompt description explicitly stating 'You are an IT Helpdesk Technician' and the context of the task (Snipe-IT helpdesk queue).

privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for snipe_it_env helpdesk_request_fulfillment task by confirming that the prerequisite Users (Sarah Jenkins, David Chen, Maria Garcia, Robert Taylor, James Smith) and Hardware/Accessories/Consumables are synthetically generated and explicitly injected via setup_task.sh API and SQL queries. Verified that the expected hardware checkout targets (LPT-8001 for Sarah, MON-8002 for David, Magic Mouse for Maria, HP 64X for Robert) exactly match the task description instructions. Furthermore, discovered that the task is defective because 'verifier.py' is entirely missing from the environment, rendering the task unscorable.
